title: macaranga amboinensis
intro: Macaranga amboinensis is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the 'giant liverleaf' or 'wild liver'. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Macaranga amboinensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a remedy for wounds and sore throats. Herbal preparations of Macaranga amboinensis include infusions and decoctions, which are often consumed in tea form or applied topically as a paste or ointment.
